nodes.label: AI as learning tool for better coding patterns
nodes.grounding_span: It is easier for AI to count the number of a particlar diagnosis as opposed to me counting them myself

nodes.label: Confidentiality in AI use
nodes.label_negative: Unconstrained AI use with sensitive data
nodes.grounding_span: I only utilize AI for tasks where no confidnetial information is dislcosed

nodes.label: AI as quality enhancer and time saver
nodes.grounding_span: AI would allow me to organize and review it more quickly

nodes.label: AI as helper for complicated tasks
nodes.grounding_span: being able to share my ability to utilize AI and show others how easy It can be is really satifiying

nodes.label: AI as supplementary aide to human expertise
nodes.grounding_span: There should always be a second set of eyes to make sure work products are as accuate as possible

nodes.label: Accuracy and quality in medical coding
nodes.grounding_span: I have to read each medical provider's note on a patient to ensure that the documentation matches the diagnosis

nodes.label: Patient confidentiality and privacy
nodes.grounding_span: the notes sometimes contain protected health information such as namesand other PII, and this could potentially violate confidentiality

nodes.label: Helping others and collegiality
nodes.grounding_span: I like seeing other people perform more efficiently and I like making their jobs easier

nodes.label: Frustration with AI pattern recognition failures
nodes.grounding_span: It definitely satisfies my inner perfectionist

nodes.label: Frustration with EHR limitations that AI helps overcome
nodes.grounding_span: it is also frustrasting to have to check the work of an electronic health record

nodes.label: Pride in being an AI pioneer and helping colleagues
nodes.grounding_span: being able to share my ability to utilize AI and show others how easy It can be is really satifiying

nodes.label: Confidence in AI as a key skill
nodes.grounding_span: I'm pretty confident in my ability to spot them

nodes.label: Iterative querying and fine-tuning pattern recognition
nodes.grounding_span: sometimes I'll ask for a straightforward answer, and other times I'll ask for addtional information, which has suprisingly helped me fine-tune my pattern recognition abilites

nodes.label: Pragmatic boundary-setting based on knowledge
nodes.grounding_span: I only utilize AI for tasks where no confidnetial information is dislcosed
